question: Game Handicap: ZNT (-1.5) vs mCon esports (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the LoL match between ZennIT and mCon esports in the Road Of Legends Playoffs, scheduled for February 10 at 12:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "ZennIT" if ZennIT wins 2 or more games than mCon esports in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "mCon esports".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - February 12, 12AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

question: XRP Up or Down - February 12, 1AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the XRP/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the XRP/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/XRP_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance XRP/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: First Blood in Game 1?
description:
In the upcoming match between Zero Tenacity and Virtus.pro in the DreamLeague Division 2 Playoffs, scheduled for February 10 at 10:30AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the ETH/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the ETH/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/ETH_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance ETH/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Total Kills Over/Under 23.5 in Game 2?
description:
In the upcoming match between ThunderTalk Gaming and LNG Esports in the LPL Knights Rivals, scheduled for February 10 at 1:10AM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 2.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 2 is 24 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

events.title: LoL: ThunderTalk Gaming vs LNG Esports (BO5) - LPL Knights Rivals
events.description:
This market refers to the LoL match between ThunderTalk Gaming and LNG Esports in the LPL Knights Rivals, scheduled for February 11 at 4:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "ThunderTalk Gaming" if ThunderTalk Gaming win the match against LNG Esports.

This market will resolve to "LNG Esports" if LNG Esports win the match against ThunderTalk Gaming.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/leagueoflegends/Main_Page.

question: Map Handicap: ASTRAL (-1.5) vs kONO.ECF (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between ASTRAL and kONO.ECF in the CCT Europe Series #15 Group Stage, scheduled for February 10 at 4:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "ASTRAL" if ASTRAL wins 2 or more maps than kONO.ECF in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "kONO.ECF".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

events.title: Counter-Strike: ASTRAL vs kONO.ECF (BO3) - CCT Europe Series #15 Group Stage
events.description:

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org/.

question: Solana Up or Down - February 12, 5AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the SOL/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the SOL/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/SOL_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance SOL/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Game Handicap: OMG (-1.5) vs EDward Gaming (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the LoL match between EDward Gaming and Oh My God in the LPL Knights Rivals, scheduled for February 10 at 4:20AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Oh My God" if Oh My God wins 2 or more games than EDward Gaming in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "EDward Gaming".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 2 is 38 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

events.title: LoL: EDward Gaming vs Oh My God (BO5) - LPL Knights Rivals
events.description:
This market refers to the LoL match between EDward Gaming and Oh My God in the LPL Knights Rivals, scheduled for February 11 at 1:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "EDward Gaming" if EDward Gaming win the match against Oh My God.

This market will resolve to "Oh My God" if Oh My God win the match against EDward Gaming.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/leagueoflegends/Main_Page.

question: Will the highest temperature in Toronto be -2°C on February 12?
description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Toronto Pearson Intl Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 12 Feb '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Toronto Pearson Intl Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/ca/mississauga/CYYZ.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Miami Intl Airport Station in degrees Fahrenheit on 12 Feb '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Miami Intl Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/us/fl/miami/KMIA.

question: Total Kills Over/Under 38.5 in Game 2?
description:
In the upcoming match between EDward Gaming and Oh My God in the LPL Knights Rivals, scheduled for February 10 at 4:20AM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 2.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 2 is 39 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

events.title: LoL: EDward Gaming vs Oh My God (BO5) - LPL Knights Rivals
events.description:
This market refers to the LoL match between EDward Gaming and Oh My God in the LPL Knights Rivals, scheduled for February 11 at 1:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "EDward Gaming" if EDward Gaming win the match against Oh My God.

This market will resolve to "Oh My God" if Oh My God win the match against EDward Gaming.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/leagueoflegends/Main_Page.
